raw_text: umair sufyan address house # 34, spring valley, simly dam road, barakahu, islamabad. contact number: +92 333 5268152 email address: umair.sufyan@caapakistan.com.pk umairsufyan@gmail.com objective the aviation industry has always held a fascination for me which pushed me to pursue my higher education in the same field. after graduating from college of aeronautical engineering in b.e. aerospace aspired to become an aviation professional in an organization at the head of the aviation industry. as part of the aviation regulatory body of pakistan, have had significant exposure to the vast field of civil aviation and endeavored to excel as an inspector in this field. now look forward to further my development by achieving my goal of being part of an organization at the head of the aviation industry. experience joint director airworthiness (senior airworthiness surveyor) april 2018 - present sr. deputy director airworthiness (airworthiness surveyor) december 2009 - april 2018 pakistan civil aviation authority > aircraft defect/ incident investigation: e investigation of in-flight reported defects including root cause analysis and review of maintenance actions for compliance with manufacturer recommendations. e participated in investigation of repeated defects of spoiler failure on a330 aircraft. e participated in investigation of engine fire during flight on airbus a310 aircraft. e participated in investigation of engine vibration on airbus a320 aircraft e participated in investigation of green hydraulic low on airbus a320 aircraft resulting in runway excursion. e participated in investigation of defect on hp bleed valve of airbus a330 aircraft. e participated in investigation of thrust reverser unlock message during flight on airbus a330 aircraft. e participated in investigation engine fire due to prop brake engaged on atr 42-500 aircraft. > aircraft safety oversight e ramp inspection of pakistan registered aircraft for ensuring safe operation and evaluation of maintenance standards. e inspection for renewal of certificate of airworthiness of large aircraft (including a-330, a-320, b777,etc) including review of scheduled maintenance, ad/sb incorporation etc. e review of modifications and repairs for compliance with manufacturer specified procedures and applicable regulations. > audit & surveillance of caa approved organizations e carrying out annual audits for renewal of granted approval of pcaa approved maintenance organizations e (pia engineering, airblue, shaheen air, etc) under pcaa ano 145. e conducting audits of aircraft maintenance training organization for grant of approval under ano-147 and continued validity. e audits of line stations and aircraft stores for ensuring compliance with applicable standards for procurement, acceptance and storage. e scheduling, monitoring and execution of annual audit plan of operators and mros in assigned region. > type certification: e participated in the process of compliance verification against design standards of amended type certificate of mfi 17-11 aircraft. e participated in the process of issuance of amended type certificate to glass cockpit modification on super mushshak aircraft. > formulation of regulations e formulation and revision of airworthiness regulations to ensure compliance with icao requirements. e revision of airworthiness requirements for air operator certificate holders. e implementation of sari easa based regulations. (part 66, 145 & 147). e development of pcaa requirements for design & manufacturing organizations in light of easa part-21. > achievements e received dgs commendation certificate for participation in icao usoap audit of pakistan caa in 2010. e participated in compliance verification for amendment in type certificate of mushshak aircraft. e member of aircraft type certification board for amendment in type certificate of glass cockpit modification on super mushshak aircraft. e member working group for easa part-21 implementation in pakistan. education bachelor of engineering (aerospace) 2008 - college of aeronautical engineering, national university of sciences & technology gce a levels (cambridge university) 2003 - the city school, islamabad. gce o levels (cambridge university) 2001 - the city school, islamabad. specialized training = b1.1 boeing 737-300/400/500 (cfm56-3 engine) aircraft type maintenance course - shaheen air training center = b1.3 agustawestland aw139 (pwc pt6) helicopter maintenance course - agustawestland training academy = airbus a320 family aircraft familiarization course - airblue engineering = airbus a330 family aircraft familiarization course shaheen air training center = easa part 21 course on issue of type certificate, supplemental type certificate & design organization approval - bureau veritas aeronautics & space division = safety management system course pakistan civil aviation authority = audit techniques (generic) course coscap south asia = aircraft accident & investigation and continuing airworthiness - pakistan civil aviation authority = aircraft ramp inspection course - pia training centre karachi. qualification pcaa ano-66 aml in cat b1.1 (aml#: pcaa.66.02500) ielts general training examination - overall band 8.5 (ref #18pk004873sufu015g) skills, abilities & interests e capable of handling unique problems and devising solutions. e capable of planning and executing projects to a timeline e well-disciplined and punctual. e capable of meeting targets within assigned deadlines with ease. e complete command on ms office, ms project. e proficient in english and urdu. page 2
